# MyaiOne Status

Open-source status page and uptime monitor for MyaiOne, powered by [Upptime](https://upptime.js.org).

## Monitors

- Los Angeles: dummy endpoint `https://example.com/`
- Amsterdam: dummy endpoint `https://example.org/`

Replace the dummy URLs in `.upptimerc.yml` when production health check endpoints are available.

## Live Status

The status page is configured for [https://status.myaione.com](https://status.myaione.com).
